heroSubtitle: Analyzing Systems · Informing Policy · Driving Impact
aboutHeadline: Quantitative analyst bridging applied mathematics, policy analysis, and operations leadership.
aboutParagraphs: I am a quantitative analyst with training in applied mathematics and political science from UCLA. My work focuses on forecasting under uncertainty, building scalable operational systems, and translating complex data into strategic insights for diverse stakeholders.

With experience spanning climate consulting at Clark Street Associates, international alliance development in Argentina, and large-scale program operations at UCLA, I combine rigorous mathematical modeling with policy analysis. I am passionate about leveraging Python, R, and data systems to solve multi-dimensional challenges.
metaSkills: Python, R, SQL, Excel/Sheets, C++, JavaScript, Spanish
galleryTravelDescription: Capturing quiet, beautiful moments from around the world.
galleryVolunteeringDescription: Providing educational outreach, global committee leadership, and academic mentoring.
